questions.question: How many seats are authorized on the board or committee, how many are currently filled, and how many vacancies exist?
questions.answer: The Cortlandt CAC is authorized to have up to 11 voting members appointed by the Town Board, plus up to 2 student members (one-year terms). Additionally, there are 3 non-voting ex officio members: the Town Supervisor, the Chairman of the Planning Board, and the Director of Planning and Community Improvement. The statute does not specify how many seats are currently filled or how many vacancies exist. [§ 15-3, amended 4-22-2025 by L.L. No. 3-2025]
questions.gap: The statute provides authorized seat counts but does not list currently filled seats or existing vacancies. Full alignment with best practice would require current membership roster and vacancy information.
nextPrompts: What is the current membership roster of the Cortlandt CAC, including names and appointment dates?
